articles.title: At least six Americans exposed to Ebola in DR Congo, US media report - BBC
articles.description: One of the six Americans believed to have been exposed is experiencing symptoms, according to media reports.
articles.content: The disease spread to a number of countries within and outside of West Africa, including Guinea, Sierra Leone, the United States, the United Kingdom and Italy, killing 11,325 people.

articles.author: Rebecca Cohen
articles.title: Omaha Steaks, Nerf basketball and Hazmat suits: Former contagion patients describe life in quarantine amid Hantavirus - NBC News
articles.description: As more than 40 Americans remain in quarantine for up to six weeks following a hantavirus outbreak aboard a cruise ship, former patients who spent time inside some of the nation’s highest-security medical isolation units during previous viral contagions are s…
